content: Standard LLM compression quality eval: WikiText-2 perplexity (seq len 2048) is the primary intrinsic metric; compare compressed vs original FP16. Perplexity increase <0.5 points generally considered acceptable. Perplexity alone is widely critiqued as insufficient (fails to capture downstream task degradation, safety, multilingual). Complementary metrics: MMLU/ARC (knowledge), MT-Bench (instruction following), JS/KL divergence (output distribution drift), downstream EM/F1/ROUGE. UniComp framework uses 13 metrics across performance/reliability/efficiency. DeepCompressor uses WikiText2 PPL as primary. Spectral-Stream's missing eval is its biggest quality-trust gap vs standard.
